_disclaimer: SYNTHETIC DATA - Semantic model seed aligned to the Fabric IQ ontology concept: entities, relationships and business rules for the enterprise learning domain.

relationships.description: A certification may require completing another certification first (prerequisites field).
A role is aligned to a primary and optionally a secondary certification.
A certification covers a set of skills; skill gaps are computed against assessment results per skill.

business_rules.rule: A learner is exam-ready only when practice_score_avg >= pass_threshold_practice AND hours_studied >= 0.8 * recommended_hours.
A study plan must not schedule more weekly study hours than the learner's focus_hours_per_week minus 5 (protected focus buffer).
Expert-level certifications cannot be recommended before prerequisites are passed.
If meeting_hours_per_week > 20, weekly study allocation is capped at 4 hours and flagged as capacity-constrained.
Manager insights must only expose team-level aggregates, never individual raw scores without the learner's consent flag.
